positive: A majestic, highly detailed celestial animal portrait of a stylized fox, rendered in intricate linework and dot-work etching style. The fox is seated centrally, surrounded by geometric constellations, crescent moons, and ethereal flora elements. Strong contrast between deep midnight blues and luminous golds. The composition is perfectly circular and balanced, emphasizing clean silhouettes and elegant, flowing lines suitable for textile printing. Inspired by Art Deco engravings and modern mystic art. Studio lighting, extreme detail, vector quality, high resolution.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, out of focus, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, low contrast, ugly, cropped, jpeg artifacts
